TEMPLATE: risk entry. Entries live grouped in docs/quality/risks.md.
IDs: RISK-NNN. Copy one block per risk. Delete this comment block.
-->

### RISK-NNN — <short name>

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Technical / Product / Data / Demo / Security |
| **Likelihood** | High / Medium / Low |
| **Impact** | High / Medium / Low |
| **Status** | Open / Mitigating / Accepted / Closed |
| **Added** | <YYYY-MM-DD> (MST) |

**Risk.** <What could go wrong, and what triggers it.>

**Mitigation.** <What we do to reduce the likelihood or the impact.>

**Owner / revisit trigger.** <Who watches it; what signal reopens it.>
